package rulecoverage

func PositiveExecInsideLoopWithoutBatch() string {
    ruleID := "exec_inside_loop_without_batch"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Exec(...) or ExecContext(...) used for row-by-row SQL writes inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
